desc: Offline isolate why the 7.1.3 Image-usb-host stops DockChannel HID after MTP firmware reports Keyboard ready while the known-good 7.2-rc2 Image-keyboard registers Apple 05ac:0359 input devices. Compare embedded configs, mailbox/HID source and applied patch stacks, DT deltas, and saved logs; produce the smallest storage-disabled kernel/build correction retaining ttydc0, with hashes and static preflight. No rig or MMIO.
author: codex
